case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $847.00 US CURREN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RACKLIN, EDWARD

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $847.00 US CURREN CY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $847.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT EDWARD RACKLIN. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
